meta.name: PokéStock Canada storefront snapshot
meta.disclaimer: Availability is a dated observation, not a live stock guarantee. Official release dates and Canadian storefront events are tracked separately.

products.name: 30th Celebration Pokémon Center Elite Trainer Box
products.summary: The Pokémon Center edition of the 30th Celebration Elite Trainer Box.
products.canadaNote: Listed in Pokémon Center Canada's New Releases at CA$80.99 and observed sold out.

source.title: Pokémon TCG: 30th Celebration Pokémon Center Elite Trainer Box

products.name: 30th Celebration Tech Sticker Collection (Alolan Exeggutor)
products.summary: An Alolan Exeggutor foil promo, matching tech sticker sheet, and three 30th Celebration booster packs.
products.canadaNote: The Canadian buying window opened before the announced September product release; it is currently observed sold out.

source.title: Pokémon TCG: 30th Celebration Tech Sticker Collection

products.name: 30th Celebration Tech Sticker Collection (Lucario)
products.summary: A Lucario foil promo, matching tech sticker sheet, and three 30th Celebration booster packs.
products.canadaNote: The Canadian buying window opened before the announced September product release; it is currently observed sold out.

source.title: Pokémon TCG: 30th Celebration Tech Sticker Collection

products.name: 30th Celebration Knock Out Collection
products.summary: A compact 30th Celebration collection featuring Eevee.
products.canadaNote: Listed in Pokémon Center Canada's New Releases at CA$13.99 and observed sold out.

products.name: Mega Evolution—Chaos Rising Elite Trainer Box
products.summary: Nine Chaos Rising booster packs, a Fennekin promo, sleeves, Energy cards, dice, accessories, and a storage box.
products.canadaNote: No current Canadian storefront observation is recorded in this snapshot.

products.name: Mega Moonlit Tin
products.summary: Choose a Mega Gengar ex or Mega Clefable ex foil promo and open four booster packs.
products.canadaNote: No current Canadian storefront observation is recorded in this snapshot.

products.name: Mega Evolution—Ascended Heroes Booster Bundle
products.summary: A compact bundle containing six booster packs from the Ascended Heroes expansion.
products.canadaNote: No current Canadian storefront observation is recorded in this snapshot.
